open.t: Internet/WiFi strength map -- show signal strength per room to find weak spots. Likely sources: the location plugin's WiFi-AP RSSI scanning + house-map room layout, and/or the router API.
Lighting page reorg -- active lights first, then by area (Upstairs/Downstairs/Front/Rear), then by room
Modularity hardening -- make scenes + av-devices skip a missing plugin (graceful degradation)

JARVIS Foundation 1 -- Device/presence tracking. ENGINE BUILT: location plugin pulls all connected devices + per-device AP signal. TO FINISH: (1) map which carried device belongs to which person; (2) map each WiFi AP to an area. Then wire the 2 maps into config + restart.
JARVIS Foundation 2 -- Identity: enroll faces (gallery) + voices (voiceprints) and wire recognition into the dashboard/voice loop. Both stores currently empty.
JARVIS -- Location-adaptive desktop dashboard: the view changes with your room; shows current room + that area's lights (on/off) + quick nav to other devices.
JARVIS -- Audio: auto-turn-on the zone for the room you're in.
JARVIS -- Gate: detect a car at / entering the gate and push a notification (extend vision-ai YOLO on the gate cam + alerts).
JARVIS -- Detect a package delivery and notify.
Retire/relabel unused per-plugin widget.html files (shell.html is the canonical UI)
Migrate Vision + Voice services AND their data into the plugins -- they currently live in a legacy tree. Plugins are only proxies today, so they aren't self-contained or delete-safe.

done.n: service tiles (Spotify/Sirius/Pandora/iHeart/Prime) -> zone picker -> routes Input 1 default / Input 2 if busy -> opens app; safe commands only

done.t: Delete-safe + graceful degradation set as standing architecture goal
done.n: recorded; drivers already fault-isolated; new UI built dynamic/null-safe

done.t: Confirmed audio-bridge is a clean-delete candidate
done.n: fully orphaned; only its own config entry references it; queued for cleanup

done.t: Task lists surfaced in the admin panel
done.n: Tasks + Integration read from static JSON; no restart

done.t: Delete-safe UI -- dashboard tiles/tabs gate on /api/plugins
done.n: home tiles (lights/security/audio/camera/locks/gate) + Audio/Cameras tabs auto-hide if their plugin isn't loaded; FAIL-OPEN (hides nothing if it can't confirm); verified 0 hidden with all 15 plugins present.
Pynetgear logs in and pulls connected devices with live signal %. This unblocks presence tracking AND the WiFi strength map.
